prompt: In this tournament flop spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Check keeps variance lower when equity is unclear.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Checking fits the track cue set, so the line keeps the pot controlled when the pressure edge is not strong enough to fire.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Check because a survival-first flop should keep variance lower when the equity picture is still unclear.
